channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Thursday, May 21, 2026
item.description: Two forces are converging this week that touch almost everything on your plate, Midya: a historic AI news cycle — OpenAI cracking a math olympiad problem autonomously, Google betting its entire product empire on AI, Meta funding it all through layoffs — and a global tightening of...
